title: uniface.InvalidDataObjectException
text: uniface.InvalidDataObjectException Exception thrown if the object on which the function is called is no longer valid. There could be a number of reasons why this exception is thrown. For example, the object represents an occurrence that has been deleted in the mean time. Related Links APIs: DSP Client-Side JavaScript The Uniface JavaScript API is a collection of object-oriented programming interfaces that can be used in dynamic server pages (DSPs) to manipulate Uniface data objects in the browser, without round-trip processing to the server.
